name: Stuffed Boiled Jumbo Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh bread crumbs, lightly toasted under broiler
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts of water to a boil and add 1 tablespoon salt.
2. Remove the outer dark green leaves from each artichoke until what remains is pale at the base and green at the ends. Cut off the green points about 1-inch from the top of the pointy end. Rub freshly cut sides with half a lemon to retain light color.
3. Cut the artichokes into quarters. Using a small sharp knife, trim away the choke from the inside and rub all cut edges with lemon.
4. Boil for 5 minutes and refresh in cold water. Drain and set aside.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
6. In a medium sauté pan, heat 3 ounces of olive oil over medium heat and cook onion and garlic until softened, about 8-10 minutes. Allow to cool and stir in parsley, grated cheese, and toasted bread crumbs. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Arrange artichokes in one layer in a shallow casserole dish. Bake uncovered for about 20 minutes or until breadcrumbs are golden brown.
Yield: 4 servings as an antipasto
